MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY GEORGE MATARAGAS SET FOR JUL-01-2010 IS CONTINUED TO DEC-01-2010 AT 3:30 PM IN 506. CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION. CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT; DEFENDANT MAKING INSTALLMENT PAYMENTS. IF NO APPEARANCES ON DECEMBER 1, 2010, CONTINUE 6 MONTHS FOR PROGRESS REPORT, AND THEREAFTER IN 6 MONTH INTERVALS FOR A TOTAL OF 31 MONTHS. IF CLAIM SATISFIED, MOTION TO VACATE WILL BE GRANTED, AND CLAIMED DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S.VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY GEORGE MATARAGAS ON JUN-01-2011 - DENIED. CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE DUE TO CHAPTER 7 BANKRUPTCY OF DEFENDANT THAT COULD BE DISMISSED IN THE FUTURE OR SETASIDE. JUDGE PRO TEM: ALEXANDER ANOLIK.
